name: filter-falsy-children
visual_summary: Removes falsy children from a React component, leaving only truthy children.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready function component with the following characteristics:

Name: filter-falsy-children
Description: Removes falsy children from a React component, leaving only truthy children.
Style: 
Interactions: 
Tags: filter, children, React

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/Group/filter-falsy-children/filter-falsy-children.ts
import { Children, ReactElement, ReactNode } from 'react';

export function filterFalsyChildren(children: ReactNode) {
  return (Children.toArray(children) as ReactElement[]).filter(Boolean);
}
